originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning dev with Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging CUDA-C Model Mismatch and Finalizing Puffer 4 Release
summary: Debugged a weight mismatch between CUDA and C model implementations for a web demo policy. Merged Spencer's pull request, trained and benchmarked policies across multiple environments, drafted release tweets, and prepared the Docker build for the Puffer 4 launch.
